executives.name: Arnold Donald
executives.background: Former President and CEO of Carnival Corporation & plc. He joined the board in 2023.

tenure_dates.title: President and Chief Executive Officer (2013–2022); Director (2001–2023)

executives.name: Randall Weisenburger
executives.background: Mr. Weisenburger is the Managing Member of Mile 26 Capital LLC. He was previously the CFO of Omnicom Group Inc. and a founding member of Wasserstein Perella & Co.
